summary: Iteration 13 — Multi-tenant architecture E2E validated. All 22 backend pytest cases PASS (super-admin login/me, /api/tenants RBAC, cross-tenant isolation for machines/dashboard/diagnostics/measurements/thermal, spoofed X-Tenant-Id ignored for tenant-admins, POST/DELETE /api/tenants, new tenant empty state, global defects shared, write requires tenant scope, /auth/register scoped). Frontend flows verified via Playwright for both super-admin and tenant-admin.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to ~1310 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, tenants, machines, measurements, thermal, defects, diagnostics, reports, manual) for maintainability.

DELETE /api/tenants/{tid} deletes tenant + all tenant-scoped collections, but does NOT block deletion of the currently-scoped tenant of a super-admin session; harmless (super-admin can just re-select), but consider audit-logging the tenant deletion (currently no /deletion_logs entry is written for the tenant itself).
get_current_user() re-queries Mongo on every request. Fine for now, but if traffic grows, consider a short-lived in-memory cache keyed on JWT jti to reduce DB roundtrips.

Frontend Layout.js reads localStorage 'fs_tenant' directly for the no-tenant-banner condition rather than using the AuthContext tenantId state — works but could cause a stale render on very fast tenant switches. Minor.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — super-admin sees tenant-switcher + nav-clientes + no-tenant-banner + 2 tenant cards (SAUDALI ALIMENTOS, FS SOLUÇÕES DEMO); Acessar sets fs_tenant and shows 413 machines & dashboard KPIs; tenant-select switch works; new-tenant modal + save-tenant-btn present. Tenant-admin (admin@saudali.com) sees NO tenant-switcher, NO nav-clientes, NO no-tenant-banner and gets 413 machines directly.

test_credentials: Super-Admin: admin@fssolucoes.com/admin123 (superadmin, tenant_id null). Tenant Admins: admin@saudali.com/demo123 (SAUDALI ALIMENTOS, ~413 machines), admin@fsdemo.com/demo123 (FS SOLUÇÕES DEMO, ~413 machines migrated).
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed changes. Test lifecycle: create+delete of TEST_TenantCo_* tenant, TEST_M_* machines (deleted at end), TEST_user_*@saudali.com scoped to SAUDALI (attempted cleanup). No pollution left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant is fully functional. Tenants in DB: SAUDALI ALIMENTOS (id lookup via GET /api/tenants) with 413 machines & FS SOLUÇÕES DEMO with duplicate 413 machines. Isolation rules: Super-admin MUST send X-Tenant-Id header for scoped reads (empty otherwise) and for writes (400 otherwise). Tenant-admins are auto-scoped; any X-Tenant-Id header they send is IGNORED (verified). /api/defects is intentionally GLOBAL — same list across tenants. Frontend axios interceptor (src/lib/api.js) sends X-Tenant-Id from localStorage 'fs_tenant'; AuthContext clears fs_tenant on non-superadmin login and on logout. Backend defects insert has unique index on 'nome'.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
